businessName.title: Business name
businessName.description: Used to sign the text-back sent to callers.

destinationNumber.title: Forwarding number
destinationNumber.description: The line an incoming call rings before it counts as missed (e.g. the front desk). Consumed by the Twilio voice webhooks.

ringTimeoutSeconds.title: Ring timeout (seconds)
ringTimeoutSeconds.description: How long the forwarding number rings before the call is treated as missed and the text-back fires.

textBackTemplate.title: Text-back message template
textBackTemplate.description: Supports the {business_name} placeholder. Sent automatically the moment a call goes unanswered.
textBackTemplate.default: Hi! You just called {business_name} and we couldn't pick up. Reply here and we'll get right back to you.
